requirement_topic.en: No mandatory EU-style outdoor-noise product marking in Indonesia
requirement_topic.zh: 印尼不存在欧盟式户外噪声产品标识强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: 印尼不存在歐盟式戶外噪聲產品標識強制要求

summary.en: No dedicated Indonesian equivalent to the EU outdoor-noise product marking regime was identified as a market-entry gate for general power tools. Noise exposure control is typically enforced through workplace and environmental administration practices rather than a mandatory product-marking plate on each tool model.
summary.zh: 未识别到印度尼西亚对一般电动工具设置类似欧盟户外噪声产品标识的市场准入门槛。噪声控制通常在作业与环境治理层面执行，而不是对每个机型加贴强制噪声标志。
summary.zht: 未識別到印尼對一般電動工具設置類似歐盟戶外噪聲產品標識的市場准入門檻。噪聲控制通常在作業與環境治理層面執行，而不是對每個機型加貼強制噪聲標誌。

standards_or_laws: No known Indonesian mandatory market gate equivalent to Directive 2000/14/EC for power-tool noise marking
Operational and workplace noise control expectations for domestic use contexts
Environmental noise and equipment-use supervision in Indonesian enforcement practice

summary.en: China noise handling for power tools is commonly based on GB/T noise test methods and workplace environmental limits, without a separate EU-style guaranteed sound-power product marking route for most hand-held tool categories.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具噪声处理通常基于 GB/T 噪声测试方法和作业环境限值，对多数手持工具并不存在单独的欧盟式保障声功率产品标识制度。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具噪聲處理通常基於 GB/T 噪聲測試方法和作業環境限值，對多數手持工具並不存在單獨的歐盟式保證聲功率產品標識制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T noise test and workplace noise control references
Technical noise data in Chinese tool safety files

gap.en: Honest handling is to avoid over-mapping from EU lanes. There is no separate Indonesian product-marking gate equivalent to EU Directive 2000/14/EC, but noise declarations should still be consistent with local operational use and procurement risk requirements.
gap.zh: 诚实处理方式是避免从欧盟通道直接套入。印尼没有类似欧盟2000/14/EC的产品级噪声标识强制门槛，但噪声声明仍应与当地作业场景和采购要求一致。
gap.zht: 誠實處理方式是避免從歐盟通道直接套用。印尼沒有類似歐盟 2000/14/EC 的產品級噪聲標識強制門檻，但噪聲聲明仍應與當地作業場景和採購要求一致。

mandatory_status.target: No dedicated Indonesian mandatory product-noise marking condition equivalent to EU outdoor-noise marking was identified for common power-tool market entry.
mandatory_status.cn: China also generally does not rely on a separate EU-style power-tool noise-marking gate in most domestic market placements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No EU-style noise-label gap is typically closed in this lane. The practical requirement is evidence consistency in noise declaration and operational-use controls, not a mandatory Indonesian outdoor-noise product-marking workflow.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在该类通道通常不存在必须补齐的欧盟式噪声标识差距。实务关键在于噪声声明和使用场景控制的一致性，而非印尼专属的户外噪声产品标识流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在該類通道通常不存在必須補齊的歐盟式噪聲標識差距。實務關鍵在於噪聲聲明和使用場景控制的一致性，而非印尼專屬的戶外噪聲產品標識流程。
